prompt_prefix: Square app icon and favicon concept for MoobangBench, an AI coding benchmark website. Original brand mark, centered composition, instantly readable at 24 pixels, flat vector geometry, crisp SVG-like edges, near-black background, warm amber accent with restrained off-white details, modern developer-tool aesthetic.
prompt_suffix: No full brand name, no sentences, no tiny text, no mockup, no device frame, no photorealism, no gradients that reduce legibility, no watermark, no existing company logos.

jobs.prompt: Bold geometric letter M built from two connected circuit traces, compact rounded-square silhouette.
Minimal coding bench symbol combining angle brackets with a sturdy horizontal benchmark platform.
Isometric cube split into code-grid faces with one precise benchmark tick mark.
Friendly abstract AI agent visor above three ascending ranking bars, highly simplified.
Two code bracket pillars connected by a sharp lightning bridge, energetic but minimal.
Terminal window reduced to a trophy silhouette with a single prompt chevron.
Hexagonal neural node network forming a subtle M-shaped negative space.
Performance gauge merged with a mouse cursor arrow, communicating interactive benchmarks.
Three nested code brackets forming a compact dimensional badge and comparison layers.
Playful geometric cyber bull or cow head made from code bracket horns, confident mascot mark, very simple.
